title: Product Certification Specialist
description:
La risorsa garantisce la conformità normativa dei dispositivi medici lungo l’intero ciclo di vita del prodotto, occupandosi dell’applicazione dei Design Controls, della gestione della documentazione tecnica e delle certificazioni di prodotto. Collabora strettamente con Regulatory Affairs per attività di registrazione (in particolare extra\-UE), definizione dell’intended use, classificazione dei prodotti e identificazione degli standard applicabili. Supporta, inoltre, le attività di sviluppo e sustaining, monitora l’evoluzione normativa e contribuisce alla strategia di compliance globale.

**Tasks \& Responsibilities**

· Applicare e mantenere le politiche Qualità durante sviluppo e sustaining prodotto

· Partecipare come independent reviewer nei progetti di sviluppo e modifiche rilevanti

· Preparare, aggiornare e verificare la documentazione tecnica secondo MDR e standard applicabili

· Gestire certificazioni CE, UKCA, MDSAP, UL, FDA e altre certificazioni internazionali

· Valutare la sostanzialità delle modifiche progettuali con R\&D e organismi notificati

· Monitorare norme e regolamenti ed eseguire gap analysis

· Gestire registrazioni nazionali e internazionali (Ministero Salute, GUDID, EUDAMED, ecc.)

· Collaborare in attività di Post Market Surveillance e supportare e/o condurre audit interni

· Erogare formazione interna su qualità e regolamentazioni varie

· Definizione, revisione e allineamento dell’intended use/intended purpose

· Giustificazione e documentazione della classificazione del dispositivo secondo MDR e regolamenti internazionali

·Analisi degli standard armonizzati, EN/ISO/IEC applicabili e identificazione dei requisiti normativi pertinenti

**Skills \& Competencies**

·Ottima conoscenza della lingua inglese

·Conoscenza di MDR, EN ISO 13485, 21 CFR 820, EN ISO 14971 e principali standard tecnici

·Conoscenza e competenza nella preparazione documentazione tecnica, audit e certificazioni

·Ottime capacità analitiche e organizzative

·Precisione e attenzione al dettaglio con approccio pragmatico

·Ottime capacità comunicative ed espositive (presentazioni, training tecnici) e di gestione autonoma delle priorità

**Experience**

Almeno 5 anni di esperienza in ruoli analoghi (qualità, design control, certificazione o Regulatory Affairs), preferibilmente in settori regolamentati di dispositivi medici

**Education**

Laurea in Ingegneria Biomedica, Meccanica, Chimica o equivalenti;  
oppure diploma tecnico con esperienza consolidata nel settore medicale.

**Sede di lavoro**: STEELCO S.p.A. Via Balegante, 27 31039 Riese Pio X (TV)

**Dipartimento**: Product Certification

**Orario di lavoro**: full time giornaliero (8\.00 \- 17\.00\)

**Tipologia contratto**: da valutare in relazione all’esperienza maturata

**Retribuzione**: da valutare in relazione all’esperienza maturata

**Informativa ai sensi del Nuovo Regolamento UE n. 679/2016**

I dati personali riportati nel *curriculum vitae* verranno trattati da Steelco Spa, con sede legale in Riese Pio X – TV, Via Balegante 27 (“Società”), per la selezione relativa alla presente posizione o ad altre analoghe. Informazioni dettagliate anche in ordine ai diritti riconosciuti dalla normativa in materia di protezione dei dati personali, sono riportate nell’informativa disponibile sul sito internet della Società alla pagina “Lavora con noi” http://www.steelcospa.com/it/?option\=com\_rsform\&formId\=5

Retribuzione: a partire da €25\.000,00 all'anno

Sede di lavoro: Di persona

title: Executive Director, Technology, Luxembourg
description:
We’re building a relationship\-oriented bank for the modern world. We need talented, passionate professionals who are dedicated to doing what’s right for our clients.
At CIBC, we embrace your strengths and your ambitions, so you are empowered at work. Our team members have what they need to make a meaningful impact and are truly valued for who they are and what they contribute.
To learn more about CIBC, please visit CIBC.com
STRATEGIC BUSINESS UNIT DESCRIPTION
The Technology Infrastructure and Innovation (TI\&I) group spans the areas of Information Technology, Infrastructure, Transformation, Security, Enterprise Programs \& Optimization and Contact Centres. This group executes on enterprise programs, manages and enhances the technology and operational processes that run CIBC’s businesses worldwide, as well as providing specialized service and advice to our business partners.
CIBC Technology is responsible for the delivery and operations of technology in support of CIBC lines of business and clients. Through a combination of in\-house systems development and working with leading technology partners, the division delivers world\-class solutions in order to realize business opportunities and enhance client relationships.
JOB PURPOSE
The role will act as a delivery focused technology lead in Luxembourg with overall responsibility for regulation, audit and representing the company before the local regulator (CSSF) on all technology related matters, management of day\-to\-day operations, day\-to\-day technical support, line management of staff .
As part of International Technology the role will report into the Head of International Technology and work closely with key executives including the Luxembourg Chief Operating Officer (COO), Luxembourg Chris Risk Officer (CRO) and Head of Compliance.
The role will drive Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA) Day Two requirements and attend management governance committees (e.g. Luxembourg Executive Committee, European Operating Committee, European Risk Committee) to report status of technology operations and regulatory matters to management in Luxembourg.
As the Luxembourg technology lead the role will oversee the management of day\-to\-day user support activities, support enterprise technology changes, manage and work with UK Technology Team, ensure oversight of the local data room to enterprise standards. The role will direct end user infrastructure service delivery and operations for the Luxembourg legal entity.
KEY ACCOUNTABILITIES
Regulation, Controls \& Standards* Provide leadership with Luxembourg COO/CRO, Local Compliance representative, International Technology Governance Manager, Enterprise Technology Regulatory \& Governance to understand the relevant regulation, document gaps and mitigate derived risks
* Proactively lead and drive actions for DORA Day Two Activities, e.g. identification of Critical \& Important Functions, identification and challenge importance of applications, delivery of Digital Operational Resilience Testing artefacts from differing areas of technology and information security, management of third and forth party risks.
* Conduct desk analysis of local and European regulations and embed any required changes to the processes and systems in Luixembourg
* Conduct Horizon Scanning in conjunction with the local Luxembourg Compliance Department to identify developments and changes to regulations by the CSSF
* Confirm changes to technology standards changes with International Technology Governance Manager and local compliance representative
* Understanding cloud installations and third party governance requirements working with International Technology Third Party Governance representative
* Lead the understand the materiality of changes pertinent to Luxembourg, e.g. CIRAs to EOC impacting Luxembourg working with International Technology Governance Manager
* Provide insightful contribution at European Operating CIRA Committee (EOC) \& European Regulatory Committee (ERC) on areas of technology
* Knowledge of Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA) regulation highly desirable
* Understanding of Artificial Intelligence regulation and governance is desirable


Operational* Accountability for managing and negotiating services from internal partners within a matrix organization to clients Monitor service levels to identify opportunities for improvement. Drive management of incident resolution.
* Develop, implement and maintain policies and procedures for reporting, tracking and resolving client problems. Analyze opportunities for continuous improvement of service delivery
* Lead on operational resilience and manage Business Continuity Planning (BCP)
* Manage Technology Technician
* Lead development of technology solutions for branch expansion strategies


Change Management* Ensure execution of project changes and currency upgrades in Luxembourg
* Constantly monitor and direct the effectiveness and performance of IT infrastructure services. Lead efforts to continually deliver the business value of IT products and services.
* Direct and apply the most current technologies for complex projects and initiatives to support the business and seize new opportunities while maximizing return on investment


CROSS\-FUNCTIONAL RELATIONSHIPS* Provide technology updates to senior management committees (e.g. Luxembourg ExCo). Provide direction to European Regulatory Meeting (ERC) for matters related to Luxembourg Technology
* Develop close working relationships with Parent Bank Technology architecture, applications and infrastructure groups to ensure delivery of local governance, regulatory and change commitments
* Proactively develop and maintain the relationship with the regional senior management teams and key stakeholders, through regular 1:1 meetings and committees.
* Active management of external technology vendors/partners, who provide critical solutions and services


COMPLIANCE REQUIREMENTS/RESPONSIBILITIES* As an employee of CIBC, the incumbent must comply with all applicable CIBC and Line of Business policies, guidelines and controls
* As a director in International Technology this role must comply with all applicable CIBC and Line of Business policies, standards, guidelines and control requirements


KNOWLEDGE AND SKILLS* Involvement with regulatory bodies (e.g. CSSF, CNPD)
* Experience of governance within financial services (e.g. DORA Regulations, EU AI Act)
* Proven and demonstratable analytical
* Service Excellence; the ability to understand customer needs and expectations, provide excellent service in direct and indirect manner, and fulfill customer expectations.
* Current experience of audits and working with internal audit
* Excellent stakeholder management skills. Experience of stakeholder management within a matrix organization.
* Management of technical staff
* Self starter and able to work under pressure
* Well presented professional with good all round communications skills
* Team player, good stakeholder management skills and project management skills
* Able to perform root cause analysis and troubleshoot technology based issues
* Knowledge of Windows 11 operating system, market data trading floor client products and Microsoft Office products.
* Ability to express oneself and communicate with others verbally; recognizing that verbal communication is more than just language, it includes tone, style and structure.
* Knowledge of best practice IT frameworks (e.g. ITIL certified) and experience of ServiceNow Platform
* Tenacious, critical thinker, curious and determined mindset
* Capital Markets technology experience (desirable)


WORKING CONDITIONS* This role operates within a normal office environment with little exposure to adverse working conditions
* Based in CIBC Luxembourg Office
* Work standard business hours and provide support, when required, remotely on evenings and weekends
* Occasional travel required


What you need to know* CIBC is committed to creating an inclusive environment where all team members and clients feel like they belong. We seek applicants with a wide range of abilities and we provide an accessible candidate experience. If you need accommodation, please contact Mailbox.careers\-carrieres@cibc.com
* You need to be legally eligible to work at the location(s) specified above and, where applicable, must have a valid work or study permit


Job Location
K2 Dolce
Employment Type
Regular
Weekly Hours
40
Skills
Application Development, Change Management, Coaching, Decision Making, Enterprise Technologies, Information Technology (IT) Infrastructure, Leadership, Production Support, Service Delivery, Solutions Design, Stakeholder Management, Strategic Business Units, Technical Architecture, Technology Infrastructure Management, Technology Operations, Waterfall Model
company_description: CIBC is a leading North American financial institution. At CIBC, our purpose is to help make your ambition a reality.

title: Strategic Product Manager – Chilled Water Systems
description:
**Who are we?**

At Vertiv, we’re on a mission to empower the people that will power the future. From a simple swipe to life\-changing medicines, from push notifications to generative AI. We design, manufacture, and service the products and solutions that keep the world connected. With $6\.9 billion in sales, a strong customer base and global reach spanning nearly 70 countries, we are uniquely positioned to deliver greater value to our customers and create new opportunities for our people.  



We are currently seeking a **Strategic Product Manager** to join our dynamic team in **Piove di Sacco (PD), Italy!**

The Strategic Product Manager for Chilled Water Systems is responsible for shaping the long term direction of Vertiv’s CW portfolio and driving strategic initiatives that strengthen our competitive position across global datacenter markets.
  

This role provides market foresight, competitive intelligence, and strategic clarity to guide investments, portfolio evolution, and regional alignment.  



**What kind of work will you be doing?**

Strategic Direction \& Growth


* Develop the 3 Year Growth Scenario for the Chilled Water line, integrating global market insights, technology shifts, and customer adoption trends.
* Define offer evolution and long term ambitions, ensuring Vertiv’s CW portfolio leads in performance, sustainability, and total cost of ownership.
Build and maintain the 3 year product outlook, including expected efficiency roadmaps, regulatory impacts, and technology inflection points.  
* 

Market \& Customer Insights


* Lead market dynamics assessments across all major regions and customer segments.
* Build forward looking customer behavior models, focusing on hyperscale, colocation, and enterprise cooling strategies.
Monitor industry trends, AI\-driven density, liquid cooling adoption, heat reuse, sustainability mandates, to inform strategic decision\-making.  
* 

Competitive Intelligence


* Track long\-term competitor evolution, anticipating shifts in portfolio strategy, footprint, and technology. Focus on “to Be” than “as is”
* Lead quarterly competitor reviews, consolidating financial calls, product launches, pricing signals, and strategic implications for Vertiv.
Provide validated competitive benchmarks and insights to support portfolio and go to market decisions.  
* 

Data, Forecasting \& Strategic Validation


* Own market data validation and periodic reassessment, ensuring a unified and accurate view of TAM/SAM, forecast models, and market share.
* Collaborate with Strategy, and Product teams to convert insights into actions and investment priorities.
Support strategic decision\-making with structured analyses, scenario planning, and business\-case development.  
* 

M\&A and Strategic Adjacencies


* Support M\&A screening for adjacencies, vertical integration, and portfolio expansion opportunities.
Build strategic assessments and synergy models in collaboration with Corporate Development and Global Strategy.  
* 

**What will make you successful?**

* Clear and unified 3 year vision for CW growth, validated and adopted across regions.
* Stronger competitive position, enabled by data driven insight and anticipatory strategy.
* Portfolio evolution aligned to market needs, industry trends, and customer expectations.
* High organizational alignment across Product, Engineering, Operations, Sales, and Strategy.
* 8\+ years in Product Management, Strategy, Market Intelligence, or related roles within HVAC, datacenter cooling, or industrial systems.
* Strong understanding of chilled water architectures and datacenter thermal management.
* Proven track record in strategic planning, competitive intelligence, or portfolio strategy.
* Ability to translate complex data into simple, actionable insights for executive stakeholders.
Experience working in a global, matrixed organization.  
* 

If **YOU** are the person we are looking for, feel free to apply and let's start drafting your future career in a healthy and growing environment!  



The successful candidate will embrace Vertiv’s Core Principals \& Behaviors to help execute our Strategic Priorities.  



**OUR CORE PRINCIPALS** : Safety. Integrity. Respect. Teamwork. Diversity \& Inclusion.  



**OUR STRATEGIC PRIORITIES**

* Customer Focus
* Operational Excellence
* High\-Performance Culture
* Innovation
Financial Strength  
* 

**OUR BEHAVIORS**

* Own It
* Act With Urgency
* Foster a Customer\-First Mindset
* Think Big and Execute
* Lead by Example
* Drive Continuous Improvement
* Learn and Seek Out Development

\#LI\-DP1  



Vertiv is an Equal Opportunity/Affirmative Action employer. We promote equal opportunities for all with respect to hiring, terms of employment, mobility, training, compensation, and occupational health, without discrimination as to age, race, color, religion, creed, sex, pregnancy status (including childbirth, breastfeeding, or related medical conditions), marital status, sexual orientation, gender identity / expression (including transgender status or sexual stereotypes), genetic information, citizenship status, national origin, protected veteran status, political affiliation, or disability. If you have a disability and are having difficulty accessing or using this website to apply for a position, you can request help by sending an email to help.join@vertivco.com . If you are interested in applying or learning more about this role, please visit the company’s career page located on Vertiv.com/Careers
company_addresses: 505 N Cleveland Ave, Westerville, Ohio, United States
company_description: Vertiv is a global leader in critical digital infrastructure. The world depends on data we power and cool™

title: HEALTH TECHNICIAN (WELLNESS)
company: US Military Treatment Facilities under DHA
description:
**Summary**
-----------


**About the Position:**  

Serves as a Health Technician, Wellness in the Medical Treatment Facility.  

Performs health promotion and administrative support duties for the Armed Forces Wellness Center (AFWC)  

  

This is a Direct Hire Solicitation


  
**This job is open to**
-----------------------


### **The public**


U.S. Citizens, Nationals or those who owe allegiance to the U.S.
  
**Duties**
----------


* Provide individual or group instructions to beneficiaries to assist with the completion of health screening questionnaires and to answer health questions or general questions about screenings
* Perform individual follow\-up and health education on the results of these questionnaires making referrals to other health care providers as necessary
* Perform fitness and exercise testing to include flexibility, strength and metabolic testing
* Conduct scheduled assessments for Metabolic and Comprehensive Health and Fitness Assessments to facilitate health screening and education

  
**Requirements**
----------------


### **Conditions of employment**


* Appointment may be subject to a suitability or fitness determination, as determined by a completed background investigation.
* Male applicants born after December 31, 1959 must complete a Pre\-Employment Certification Statement for Selective Service Registration.
* You will be required to provide proof of U.S. Citizenship.
* One year trial/probationary period may be required.
* Applicants must comply with the Exceptional Family Member Program requirements as outlined in the DoD Instruction 1315\.19\.
* Must be able to satisfy the requirements of the 26JUL12 DODI 1400\.25 V1230, DoD Civilian Personnel Management System: Employment in Foreign Areas and Employee Return Rights. Visit https://www.esd.whs.mil/DD/DoD\-Issuances/140025/.
* This position has a mandatory annual seasonal influenza immunization requirement and is therefore subject to annual seasonal influenza vaccinations in accordance with Department of Defense Instruction (DoDI) 6205\.02\.
* This position is subject to screening and update of required immunizations
* Must obtain and maintain a National Commission for Certifying Agencies (NCCA) approved certified personal trainer credential within 1 year of employment.

### **Qualifications**


**Who May Apply: US Citizens**  

  

In order to qualify, you must meet the experience requirements described below. Experience refers to paid and unpaid experience, including volunteer work done through National Service programs (e.g., Peace Corps, AmeriCorps) and other organizations (e.g., professional; philanthropic; religious; spiritual; community; student; social). You will receive credit for all qualifying experience, including volunteer experience. Your resume must clearly describe your relevant experience; if qualifying based on education, your transcripts will be required as part of your application. Additional information about transcripts is in this document.  

  

**Specialized experience:**  

At least one year of specialized experience at GS\-05 level or equivalent in performing work with the responsibility of presenting formal health education classes on a variety of health subjects, using established lesson plans, audiovisual aids/equipment, and subject matter handouts, instructing clients in sound health practices with emphasis on prevention


### **Education**


Some federal jobs allow you to substitute your education for the required experience in order to qualify. For this job, you must meet the qualification requirement using experience alone \- no substitution of education for experience is permitted.


### **Additional information**


* Direct Deposit of Pay is required.
* U.S. citizens overseas under ordinarily resident status are not eligible for appointment under the Status of Forces Agreement.
* Locality pay does not apply in the overseas area.
* If an employee brings a child to an overseas location and that child is entitled to attend a DoD school on a space\-required basis in accordance with DoDEA Regulation 1342\.13, the DoDEA and the Military Department responsible for providing related services will ensure that the child, if eligible for special education, receives a free appropriate public education, including related services pursuant to DoDI 1342\.12 and DoDM 1342\.12\.
* If an employee brings an infant or toddler (up to 3 years of age) to an overseas location, and that infant or toddler, but for the child's age, is entitled to attend the DoDEA on a space\-required basis in accordance with DoDEA Regulation 1342\.13, then the Military Department responsible for EIS will provide the infant or toddler with the required EIS in accordance with the eligibility criteria consistent with DoDI 1342\.12 and DoDM 1342\.12\.
* Employees (and family members) who require medical or dental care in the overseas location will be responsible for obtaining and paying for such care. Access for civilian employees and their families to military medical and dental treatment facilities is on a space\-available and reimbursable basis only.
* Pay retention may be offered to selected applicants for positions at overseas locations. Pay retention will not be offered as an incentive for employees moving between overseas positions.
* Selectees may receive certain foreign area benefits such as: Living Quarters Allowance (LQA) or government quarters, home leave, etc. Selectees will have their eligibility for foreign area benefits determined at the time of hire in accordance with Department of State Standardized Regulation (DSSR) and DoDI 1400\.25 volume 1250\.
* For positions in a foreign country, that country's laws or international agreements may have a direct impact on the ability of an employee's same sex domestic partner or spouse to accompany the employee and receive certain benefits. If you believe you may be affected by these laws and agreements, you should familiarize yourself with relevant information and direct questions concerning a specific country (Foreign Duty Location) to the appropriate Human Resources point of contact prior to the acceptance of employment and your entrance on duty.
* The initial length of this overseas tour is 36 months.
* When you perform a Civilian Permanent Change of Station (PCS) with the government, the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) considers the majority of your entitlements to be taxable. Visit https://www.dfas.mil/civilianemployees/civrelo/Civilian\-Moving\-Expenses\-Tax\-Deduction/ for more information.
* Payment of Permanent Change of Station (PCS) costs is authorized, subject to the provisions of the Joint Travel Regulations.
  


Candidates should be committed to improving the efficiency of the Federal government, passionate about the ideals of our American republic, and committed to upholding the rule of law and the United States Constitution.


Benefits
========


A career with the U.S. government provides employees with a comprehensive benefits package. As a federal employee, you and your family will have access to a range of benefits that are designed to make your federal career very rewarding. Opens in a new windowLearn more about federal benefits.


Review our benefits


Eligibility for benefits depends on the type of position you hold and whether your position is full\-time, part\-time or intermittent. Contact the hiring agency for more information on the specific benefits offered.


  
**How you will be evaluated**
-----------------------------


You will be evaluated for this job based on how well you meet the qualifications above.


Once the announcement has closed, a review of your application package (resume, supporting documents, and responses to the questionnaire) will be used to determine whether you meet the qualification requirements listed on this announcement. Please follow all instructions carefully when applying, errors or omissions may affect your eligibility.  

  

If, after reviewing your resume and/or supporting documentation, a determination is made that you have inflated your qualifications and/or experience, you may lose consideration for this position.  

  

Selection is subject to restrictions resulting from Department of Defense referral system for displaced employees.  

  

If you have retired from federal service and you are interested in employment as a reemployed annuitant, see the information in the Reemployed Annuitant information sheet.  

  

Veterans and Military Spouses will be considered along with all other candidates.


  
**Required Documents**
----------------------


The documents you are required to submit vary based on whether or not you are eligible for preference in federal employment. A complete description of preference categories and the associated required documents is in the Applicant Checklist for Public Announcements.  

  

As described above, your complete application includes your resume, your responses to the online questionnaire, and documents which prove your eligibility to apply. **If you fail to provide these documents, you will be marked as having an incomplete application package and you will not be considered any further.**  

  

**1\. Your resume:**


* Your resume must be **two pages or less** and must support the specialized experience described in this announcement. Resumes exceeding two pages will be removed from consideration.
* For each relevant work experience, make sure you include the employer's name, job title, start and end dates (include month and year), for qualifications purposes, the number of hours worked per week, and a brief description that show you can perform the tasks at the required level listed in the job announcement. If your resume does not contain this information, your application may be marked as incomplete, and you may not receive consideration for this position.
* Use plain language. Avoid using acronyms and terms that are not easily understood. The hiring agency will not make assumptions about what's in your resume.
* If your resume includes a photograph or other inappropriate material or content, it will not be used to make eligibility and qualification determinations, and you may not be considered for this vacancy.
* For additional information, to include formatting tips, see: What to include in your resume.

**2\. Other supporting documents:**
* Cover Letter, optional
* Most recent Performance Appraisal, if applicable


  

NOTE: Documents submitted as part of the application package, to include supplemental documents, may be shared beyond the Human Resources Office. Some supplemental documents such as military orders and marriage certificates may contain personal information for someone other than you. You may sanitize these documents to remove another person's personal information before you submit your application. You may be asked to provide an un\-sanitized version of the documents if you are selected to confirm your eligibility.

### **If you are relying on your education to meet qualification requirements:**

Education must be accredited by an accrediting institution recognized by the U.S. Department of Education in order for it to be credited towards qualifications. Therefore, provide only the attendance and/or degrees from schools accredited by accrediting institutions recognized by the U.S. Department of Education.


Failure to provide all of the required information as stated in this vacancy announcement may result in an ineligible rating or may affect the overall rating.


  
**How to Apply**
----------------


To apply for this position, you must complete the online questionnaire and submit the documentation specified in the Required Documents section below.  

  

The complete application package must be submitted by 11:59 PM (EST) on 03/23/2026*to receive consideration.*


* To begin, click **Apply** to access the online application. You will need to be logged into your USAJOBS account to apply. If you do not have a USAJOBS account, you will need to create one before beginning the application (https://apply.usastaffing.gov/ViewQuestionnaire/12910949*).*
* Follow the prompts to **select your resume and/or other supporting documents** to be included with your application package. As a reminder, your resume must be **two pages or less** and must support the specialized experience described in this announcement. Resumes exceeding two pages will be removed from consideration. For additional information, refer to the 'Required Documents' section.
* You will have the opportunity to upload additional documents to include in your application before it is submitted. Your uploaded documents may take several hours to clear the virus scan process.
* After acknowledging you have reviewed your application package, complete the Include Personal Information section as you deem appropriate and **click to continue with the application process.**
* You will be taken to the online application which you must complete in order to apply for the position. Complete the online application, verify the required documentation is included with your application package, and submit the application. **Your resume selected in USAJOBS will be included, but you must re\-select other documents from your USAJOBS account or your application may be incomplete.**
* It is your responsibility to verify that your application package (resume, supporting documents, and responses to the questionnaire) is complete, accurate, and submitted by the closing date. Uploaded documents may take up to one hour to clear the virus scan.
* Additional information on how to complete the online application process and submit your online application may be found on the USA Staffing Applicant Resource Center.


  

To verify the status of your application, log into your USAJOBS account (https://www.usajobs.gov/applicant/profile/dashboard/), all of your applications will appear on the Welcome screen. The Application Status will appear along with the date your application was last updated. For information on what each Application Status means, visit: https://help.usajobs.gov/how\-to/application/status.  




### **Agency contact information**


Army Applicant Help Desk
Website
https://portal.chra.army.mil/hr\_public?id\=app\_inq

*JT\-DD83DK EUROPE DHN*  

*DO NOT MAIL*

*US*### **Next steps**


If you provided an email address, you will receive an email message acknowledging receipt of your application. Your application package will be used to determine your eligibility, qualifications, and quality ranking for this position. If you are determined to be ineligible or not qualified, your application will receive no further consideration.

title: IT SPECIALIST (SYSTEMS ADMINISTRATION)
company: US Military Treatment Facilities under DHA
description:
**Summary**
-----------


**About the Position:**  

Serves as an Information Technology Specialist (Systems Administrator) at the Vicenza Health Center within the Defense Health Agency (DHA). Provides technical support, implementation expertise, and system administration for multiple information systems in both LAN and WAN environments.  

  

  

This is a Direct Hire Solicitation


  
**This job is open to**
-----------------------


### **The public**


U.S. Citizens, Nationals or those who owe allegiance to the U.S.
  
**Duties**
----------


* Administers multiple information systems running Microsoft Windows operating systems and server platforms
* Ensures functionality, integrity, and efficiency of all server operating systems, distributed applications, and electronic messaging systems
* Maintains system configurations, installs and integrates system patches, updates, and enhancements, and documents all system baselines and modifications to production systems
* Applies information security and information assurance policies, principles, and practices rigorously to protect system integrity
* Reviews, tests, analyzes, and selects new or proposed software packages and recommends applications for installation
* Coordinates installation of new equipment and movement or reinstallation of existing equipment.
* Manages engineering projects for voice over Internet Protocol initiatives, plans technology roadmaps, and configures and optimizes VoIP and private branch exchange telephone systems and services

  
**Requirements**
----------------


### **Conditions of employment**


* Appointment may be subject to a suitability or fitness determination, as determined by a completed background investigation.
* Male applicants born after December 31, 1959 must complete a Pre\-Employment Certification Statement for Selective Service Registration.
* You will be required to provide proof of U.S. Citizenship.
* One year trial/probationary period may be required.
* Applicants must comply with the Exceptional Family Member Program requirements as outlined in the DoD Instruction 1315\.19\.
* Must be able to satisfy the requirements of the 26JUL12 DODI 1400\.25 V1230, DoD Civilian Personnel Management System: Employment in Foreign Areas and Employee Return Rights. Visit https://www.esd.whs.mil/DD/DoD\-Issuances/140025/.
* This position requires a valid, state\-issued and USAREUR Driver’s License and must be insurable in order to travel to other locations in the Command’s structure.
* This position requires you to be able to obtain and maintain a determination of eligibility for a Secret security clearance of access for the duration of employment which includes a background investigation and credit check.
* incumbent must achieve and maintain certification in information security practices and procedures at the levels of Information Assurance Technical Level II (IAT\-II) and Information Assurance Management Level I (IAM\-I).

### **Qualifications**


**Who May Apply: US Citizens**  

  

In order to qualify, you must meet the education and/or experience requirements described below. Experience refers to paid and unpaid experience, including volunteer work done through National Service programs (e.g., Peace Corps, AmeriCorps) and other organizations (e.g., professional; philanthropic; religious; spiritual; community; student; social). You will receive credit for all qualifying experience, including volunteer experience. Your resume must clearly describe your relevant experience; if qualifying based on education, your transcripts will be required as part of your application. Additional information about transcripts is in this document.  

  

**Specialized experience:**  

One year of specialized experience equivalent to the GS\-09 grade level in the Federal Services in providing technical support, implementation expertise, and system administration for multiple information systems in both LAN and WAN environments; performing a full range of systems administration duties to include installation, configuration, testing, operations, troubleshooting, and maintenance of hardware and software systems; account and access management; system security and information assurance; workstation and application support; and specialized administration of VoIP/IP telephone and telework solutions.  

  

OR  

  

**Substitution of education:**  

Ph.D. or equivalent doctoral degreeor3 full years of progressively higher level graduate education leading to a Ph.D. or equivalent doctoral degree  



### **Education**


**FOREIGN EDUCATION:** If you are using education completed in foreign colleges or universities to meet the qualification requirements, you must show the education credentials have been evaluated by a private organization that specializes in interpretation of foreign education programs and such education has been deemed equivalent to that gained in an accredited U.S. education program; or full credit has been given for the courses at a U.S. accredited college or university. For further information, visit: https://sites.ed.gov/international/recognition\-of\-foreign\-qualifications/.  



### **Additional information**


* Direct Deposit of Pay is required.
* U.S. citizens overseas under ordinarily resident status are not eligible for appointment under the Status of Forces Agreement.
* Locality pay does not apply in the overseas area.
* If an employee brings a child to an overseas location and that child is entitled to attend a DoD school on a space\-required basis in accordance with DoDEA Regulation 1342\.13, the DoDEA and the Military Department responsible for providing related services will ensure that the child, if eligible for special education, receives a free appropriate public education, including related services pursuant to DoDI 1342\.12 and DoDM 1342\.12\.
* If an employee brings an infant or toddler (up to 3 years of age) to an overseas location, and that infant or toddler, but for the child's age, is entitled to attend the DoDEA on a space\-required basis in accordance with DoDEA Regulation 1342\.13, then the Military Department responsible for EIS will provide the infant or toddler with the required EIS in accordance with the eligibility criteria consistent with DoDI 1342\.12 and DoDM 1342\.12\.
* Employees (and family members) who require medical or dental care in the overseas location will be responsible for obtaining and paying for such care. Access for civilian employees and their families to military medical and dental treatment facilities is on a space\-available and reimbursable basis only.
* Pay retention may be offered to selected applicants for positions at overseas locations. Pay retention will not be offered as an incentive for employees moving between overseas positions.
* Selectees may receive certain foreign area benefits such as: Living Quarters Allowance (LQA) or government quarters, home leave, etc. Selectees will have their eligibility for foreign area benefits determined at the time of hire in accordance with Department of State Standardized Regulation (DSSR) and DoDI 1400\.25 volume 1250\.
* For positions in a foreign country, that country's laws or international agreements may have a direct impact on the ability of an employee's same sex domestic partner or spouse to accompany the employee and receive certain benefits. If you believe you may be affected by these laws and agreements, you should familiarize yourself with relevant information and direct questions concerning a specific country (Foreign Duty Location) to the appropriate Human Resources point of contact prior to the acceptance of employment and your entrance on duty.
* The initial length of this overseas tour is 36 months.
* Relocation incentives MAY be authorized for highly qualified candidates.
* When you perform a Civilian Permanent Change of Station (PCS) with the government, the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) considers the majority of your entitlements to be taxable. Visit https://www.dfas.mil/civilianemployees/civrelo/Civilian\-Moving\-Expenses\-Tax\-Deduction/ for more information.
* Payment of Permanent Change of Station (PCS) costs is authorized, subject to the provisions of the Joint Travel Regulations.
  


Candidates should be committed to improving the efficiency of the Federal government, passionate about the ideals of our American republic, and committed to upholding the rule of law and the United States Constitution.


Benefits
========


A career with the U.S. government provides employees with a comprehensive benefits package. As a federal employee, you and your family will have access to a range of benefits that are designed to make your federal career very rewarding. Opens in a new windowLearn more about federal benefits.


Review our benefits


Eligibility for benefits depends on the type of position you hold and whether your position is full\-time, part\-time or intermittent. Contact the hiring agency for more information on the specific benefits offered.


  
**How you will be evaluated**
-----------------------------


You will be evaluated for this job based on how well you meet the qualifications above.


Once the announcement has closed, a review of your application package (resume, supporting documents, and responses to the questionnaire) will be used to determine whether you meet the qualification requirements listed on this announcement. Please follow all instructions carefully when applying, errors or omissions may affect your eligibility.  

  

If, after reviewing your resume and/or supporting documentation, a determination is made that you have inflated your qualifications and/or experience, you may lose consideration for this position.  

  

Selection is subject to restrictions resulting from Department of Defense referral system for displaced employees.  

  

If you have retired from federal service and you are interested in employment as a reemployed annuitant, see the information in the Reemployed Annuitant information sheet.  

  

Veterans and Military Spouses will be considered along with all other candidates.


  
**Required Documents**
----------------------


The documents you are required to submit vary based on whether or not you are eligible for preference in federal employment. A complete description of preference categories and the associated required documents is in the Applicant Checklist for Public Announcements.  

  

As described above, your complete application includes your resume, your responses to the online questionnaire, and documents which prove your eligibility to apply. **If you fail to provide these documents, you will be marked as having an incomplete application package and you will not be considered any further.**  

  

**1\. Your resume:**


* Your resume must be **two pages or less** and must support the specialized experience described in this announcement. Resumes exceeding two pages will be removed from consideration.
* For each relevant work experience, make sure you include the employer's name, job title, start and end dates (include month and year), for qualifications purposes, the number of hours worked per week, and a brief description that show you can perform the tasks at the required level listed in the job announcement. If your resume does not contain this information, your application may be marked as incomplete, and you may not receive consideration for this position.
* Use plain language. Avoid using acronyms and terms that are not easily understood. The hiring agency will not make assumptions about what's in your resume.
* If your resume includes a photograph or other inappropriate material or content, it will not be used to make eligibility and qualification determinations, and you may not be considered for this vacancy.
* For additional information, to include formatting tips, see: What to include in your resume.

**2\. Other supporting documents:**
* Cover Letter, optional
* Most recent Performance Appraisal, if applicable
* This position has an individual occupational requirement and/or allows for substitution of education for experience. If you meet this requirement based on education you MUST submit a copy of your transcript with your application package or you will be rated ineligible. See: Transcripts and Licenses.


  

NOTE: Documents submitted as part of the application package, to include supplemental documents, may be shared beyond the Human Resources Office. Some supplemental documents such as military orders and marriage certificates may contain personal information for someone other than you. You may sanitize these documents to remove another person's personal information before you submit your application. You may be asked to provide an un\-sanitized version of the documents if you are selected to confirm your eligibility.

### **If you are relying on your education to meet qualification requirements:**

Education must be accredited by an accrediting institution recognized by the U.S. Department of Education in order for it to be credited towards qualifications. Therefore, provide only the attendance and/or degrees from schools accredited by accrediting institutions recognized by the U.S. Department of Education.


Failure to provide all of the required information as stated in this vacancy announcement may result in an ineligible rating or may affect the overall rating.


  
**How to Apply**
----------------


To apply for this position, you must complete the online questionnaire and submit the documentation specified in the Required Documents section below.  

  

The complete application package must be submitted by 11:59 PM (EST) on 03/17/2026*to receive consideration.*


* To begin, click **Apply** to access the online application. You will need to be logged into your USAJOBS account to apply. If you do not have a USAJOBS account, you will need to create one before beginning the application (https://apply.usastaffing.gov/ViewQuestionnaire/12900935*).*
* Follow the prompts to **select your resume and/or other supporting documents** to be included with your application package. As a reminder, your resume must be **two pages or less** and must support the specialized experience described in this announcement. Resumes exceeding two pages will be removed from consideration. For additional information, refer to the 'Required Documents' section.
* You will have the opportunity to upload additional documents to include in your application before it is submitted. Your uploaded documents may take several hours to clear the virus scan process.
* After acknowledging you have reviewed your application package, complete the Include Personal Information section as you deem appropriate and **click to continue with the application process.**
* You will be taken to the online application which you must complete in order to apply for the position. Complete the online application, verify the required documentation is included with your application package, and submit the application. **Your resume selected in USAJOBS will be included, but you must re\-select other documents from your USAJOBS account or your application may be incomplete.**
* It is your responsibility to verify that your application package (resume, supporting documents, and responses to the questionnaire) is complete, accurate, and submitted by the closing date. Uploaded documents may take up to one hour to clear the virus scan.
* Additional information on how to complete the online application process and submit your online application may be found on the USA Staffing Applicant Resource Center.


  

To verify the status of your application, log into your USAJOBS account (https://www.usajobs.gov/applicant/profile/dashboard/), all of your applications will appear on the Welcome screen. The Application Status will appear along with the date your application was last updated. For information on what each Application Status means, visit: https://help.usajobs.gov/how\-to/application/status.

title: Addetto a centro estetico/addetta a centro estetico
description:
A .A.A , Ricerca personale qualificato da inserire nel proprio organico.

Esthetique Emanuelle in via Bruxelles paese Treviso, seleziona più candidature.

Requisiti Richiesti :

Qualifica professionale del settore , predisposizione a lavorare con tecnologie avanzate viso e corpo , volontà di crescita……

Esperienza nel settore da almeno 7/8 anni .

Motivati dalla passione non solo dal lato economico , puntualità.

Disponibilità agli straordinari e seguire corsi di formazione nei week end e fuori dagli orari lavorativi.

Predisposizione alla comunicazione , spirito di collaborazione ,serietà e meticolosità

Predisposta a lavorare in Tim .

Comprendere le esigenze della cliente , avere iniziativa e predisposizione nel marketing , vendita cosmetici , ordine e pulizia .

Gestire in autonomia percorsi viso e corpo .

Predisposizione alla vendita in autonomia di programmi viso , corpo e fotoepilazione laser.

Si offre Contratto CCNL a norme di legge Full\-time e/o part\-time , oltre allo stipendio , bonus economico in base agli obbiettivi prefissati

,Piano di crescita lavorativo .

Orario di lavoro dal Martedì al sabato .

Se ritieni di avere le caratteristiche descritte invia il tuo curriculum , questa posizione lavorativa fa per te .

Manuela .

Contratto di lavoro: Tempo pieno, Part\-time

Retribuzione: €1\.200,00 \- €1\.400,00 al mese

Benefit:

* Supporto allo sviluppo professionale

Lingua:

* Italiano (Obbligatorio)

Abilitazione/Certificazione:

* Qualifica di estetica (Obbligatorio)

Sede di lavoro: Di persona

title: Funzionario commerciale
description:
**Templari S.p.A.**, con oltre 20 anni di esperienza nel settore, è sinonimo di eccellenza e innovazione nella progettazione e produzione di pompe di calore ad alta efficienza.

Sviluppiamo soluzioni all’avanguardia per il comfort termico in ambito residenziale e industriale e operiamo su tutto il territorio nazionale attraverso una rete qualificata di installatori, partner tecnici e professionisti del settore.

Per il **potenziamento della nostra rete commerciale**, siamo alla ricerca di un/una **Funzionario Commerciale**.

La risorsa avrà il compito di presidiare e sviluppare commercialmente il territorio assegnato, gestendo i rapporti con clienti e partner e contribuendo alla crescita del business aziendale. L’attività prevede un costante contatto con installatori, studi tecnici, progettisti e rivenditori del settore termoidraulico, offrendo consulenza tecnica e commerciale sulle soluzioni Templari.

Principali attività

* Gestione e sviluppo delle relazioni commerciali con clienti, installatori, rivenditori e partner tecnici
* Sviluppo di nuove opportunità di business nel settore **HVAC, climatizzazione e pompe di calore**
* Promozione e presentazione delle soluzioni aziendali presso clienti e studi tecnici
* Elaborazione di offerte commerciali e gestione delle trattative
* Supporto e consulenza tecnica\-commerciale ai clienti
* Collaborazione con il reparto tecnico, service e R\&D per garantire un servizio efficace e di qualità
* Monitoraggio del mercato e dei competitor per individuare opportunità di sviluppo

Requisiti

* Ottime capacità relazionali, comunicative e negoziali
* Forte orientamento al cliente e al raggiungimento degli obiettivi commerciali
* Esperienza nel settore **HVAC, climatizzazione, pompe di calore, energie rinnovabili o impiantistica termotecnica**
* Buona conoscenza del pacchetto **Microsoft Office**
* Disponibilità a spostamenti sul territorio
* **Patente B**

Cosa offriamo

* **Contratto a tempo indeterminato**
* **Auto aziendale**
* **Sistema incentivante** e provvigioni legate ai risultati
* Inserimento in una realtà solida, innovativa e in forte crescita, con oltre 20 anni di esperienza nel settore

**Sede aziendale:** Abano Terme

Se desideri entrare a far parte di una realtà dinamica e contribuire allo sviluppo di soluzioni innovative nel settore delle **pompe di calore e della climatizzazione**, inviaci il tuo CV.

La ricerca è rivolta a candidati di entrambi i sessi (L. 903/77 e L. 125/91\) e a persone di tutte le età e nazionalità (D.Lgs. 215/03 e 216/03\). I dati personali contenuti nei CV saranno trattati da Templari S.p.A. nel rispetto del Regolamento UE 2016/679 (GDPR) esclusivamente per finalità di selezione del personale.

Contratto di lavoro: Tempo pieno

Benefit:

* Auto aziendale
* Computer aziendale

Esperienza:

* commerciale: 1 anno (Obbligatorio)

Sede di lavoro: Di persona

title: Consulenti ASM Set Luce e Gas
description:
**ASM SET**, leader storico nel settore energetico del rodigino, in partnership strategica con **EnTel Srl**, potenzia la propria rete commerciale. Siamo alla ricerca di professionisti della vendita per la zona di **Rovigo e provincia** che vogliano legare il proprio successo a un brand autorevole e radicato.

Perché scegliere ASM SET ed EnTel?

Non offriamo solo un lavoro, ma un ecosistema completo per permetterti di massimizzare i tuoi guadagni e la tua professionalità:

* **Sicurezza Economica:** Fisso mensile garantito di 800€, per darti la serenità necessaria a sviluppare il tuo portafoglio.
* **Piano Provvigionale Top di Gamma:** Provvigioni ai vertici del settore energetico, calcolate per premiare il vero talento.
* **Ricorrente e Bonus:** Premi al raggiungimento dei target e bonus annuali sui rinnovi, per costruire una rendita costante nel tempo.
* **Strumenti di Vendita Reali:** Accesso a lead qualificati e liste clienti profilate; non sarai mai lasciato solo nella ricerca di opportunità.
* **Back\-Office Dedicato:** Un supporto operativo costante che gestisce la burocrazia, lasciandoti libero di fare ciò che sai fare meglio: vendere.
* **Brand Reputation:** La forza di un marchio storico che apre le porte grazie alla fiducia già consolidata sul territorio.

Il profilo che cerchiamo

Siamo alla ricerca di consulenti commerciali determinati e dinamici. Il candidato ideale possiede:

* Esperienza pregressa nella vendita (preferibilmente di servizi).
* Forte orientamento ai risultati e capacità di negoziazione.
* Voglia di inserirsi in un progetto serio, strutturato e con reali prospettive di carriera manageriale.

Cosa offriamo (Benefit e Contratto)

* **Contratto:** Tempo pieno.
* **Dotazione Tecnica:** Cellulare e computer aziendale inclusi.
* **Formazione:** Percorso di inserimento e aggiornamento continuo sui mercati energetici.
* **Lead qualificati**

**Area di competenza:** Rovigo e provincia.

**Costruisci il tuo futuro con chi il territorio lo conosce davvero.**  
Inviaci la tua candidatura oggi stesso per un colloquio conoscitivo

Contratto di lavoro: Tempo pieno, Tempo indeterminato, Contratto con partita IVA, Agenzia

Retribuzione: €800,00 \- €3\.000,00 al mese

Benefit:

* Cellulare aziendale
* Computer aziendale

Esperienza:

* consulente energetico: 1 anno (Preferenziale)

Sede di lavoro: Di persona

title: Stagista Regulatory - Settore Chimico: PMC-Biocidi-PPP
description:
**Leonardo Lifescience Group** è il primo gruppo indipendente *Made in Italy* specializzato nella protezione delle persone e degli ambienti, sia civili che industriali, attraverso soluzioni avanzate per il controllo e la prevenzione di insetti infestanti, roditori e altri organismi nocivi.

Nasce dalla fusione di due storiche realtà italiane, *Vebi Istituto Biochimico e Bleu Line*, che uniscono il loro know\-how e la loro esperienza, con l’obiettivo di creare un polo innovativo che promuova un approccio responsabile e sostenibile.

Per **Abiotech Institute S.r.l., il polo produttivo nonché sede della ricerca e sviluppo del gruppo,**  ricerchiamo uno/una stagista per il dipartimento **REGULATORY.**

Il profilo selezionato parteciperà attivamente ai progetti del dipartimento regolatorio supportando le attività di compliance normativa dei prodotti, gestione documentale, sviluppo e registrazione dei prodotti, e gestione dei rapporti con enti regolatori, ecc.

La risorsa lavorerà a stretto contatto con i reparti Qualità, Ricerca e Sviluppo, Marketing e Commerciale, contribuendo a garantire che i prodotti rispettino tutte le normative vigenti a livello nazionale, europeo ed extra\-europeo.

**Responsabilità principali**

* Gestione e revisione di MSDS, etichette ed artworks
* Supporto nel monitoraggio delle evoluzioni regolatorie in Italia, EU ed Extra EU
* Supporto alle figure senior nella gestione e aggiornamento dossier Biocidi e Presidi Medico\-Chirurgici/prodotti transitori, in Italia, EU ed Extra EU
* Supporto alle figure senior nella gestione e aggiornamento dossier Fitosanitari e Concimi, in Italia, EU ed Extra EU
* Interfaccia con le funzioni interne (R\&D, Marketing, Qualità, Produzione, Vendite)
* Eventuale interfaccia con fornitori, clienti, consulenti, laboratori, enti ed autorità competenti

**Requisiti**

* Laurea in Chimica, Chimica Industriale, Tossicologia, Scienze Ambientali, Biologia o affini
* Ottima conoscenza della lingua inglese
* Precisione, capacità di lavorare in team, buona predisposizione all’ascolto, all’apprendimento ed al confronto, autonomia e problem solving

**Requisiti Preferenziali**

Conoscenza del mondo regolatorio, dei principali database e software regolatori

**Cosa offriamo**

* Inserimento in un gruppo industriale in forte evoluzione
* Ambiente dinamico, meritocratico e orientato allo sviluppo

**Altre Informazioni**  
La selezione è rivolta ai candidati dell'uno e dell'altro sesso ai sensi del D. Lgs. 198/2006\. Tutte le candidature devono essere accompagnate dalla autorizzazione al trattamento dei dati personali e saranno gestite ai sensi del Regolamento Europeo 2016/679 (c.d. GDPR).

Contratto di lavoro: Tempo pieno, Tirocinio formativo/stage

Retribuzione: €600,00 al mese

Benefit:

* Computer aziendale
* Mensa aziendale
* Orario flessibile

Sede di lavoro: Di persona
